articles.title: Mandhana: 'Shafali and I have a huge role to play' at the T20 World Cup
articles.description: India vice-captain Smriti Mandhana looks at the learnings from the recent T20I series in England

articles.title: Battling Australia force series decider as questions grow for Pakistan
articles.description: Tricky pitches have forced batters to adapt and led to a major role for spin and changes of pace

articles.title: Urgent meeting called for amid BBL chaos; ACA says merger has caused 'anxiety'
articles.description: The news of Melbourne Stars and Renegades merging has created uncertainty throughout the game

articles.title: New Zealand home summer to start with blockbuster all-format India tour
articles.description: The New Zealand men's side will also host Sri Lanka for an all-format tour, while the women will host Bangladesh for three T20Is and as many ODIs

articles.title: Capsey, Knight lay World Cup marker as England romp to series victory
articles.description: Formidable fourth-wicket stand made light work of 181-run chase to complete come-from-behind win

articles.title: West Indies, Sri Lanka in high-stakes push to claim 2027 World Cup spot
articles.description: After recent struggles in major tournament qualification, both teams have plenty to play for in this ODI series

articles.title: Thunder confirm Flintoff as BBL coach in 'most significant off-field acquisition in club history'
articles.description: Thunder general manager Trent Copeland says Flintoff's "knowledge of Australian cricket and our Thunder program stood out during the process"

articles.title: ICC approves red-to-pink ball change to reduce bad-light impact in Test cricket
articles.description: Both teams will have to agree to changing the ball from red to pink in case of bad light during a Test match

articles.title: Hetmyer 'reintegrated' into West Indies ODI squad with eye on 2027 World Cup
articles.description: Alzarri Joseph returns from injury while left-arm spinner Gudakesh Motie returns to the side

articles.title: Tendulkar's IPL reforms: no impact player, two-part powerplay, five overs for one bowler
articles.description: What's the best way to return some semblance of balance between bat and ball at the IPL? Sachin Tendulkar has a three-part solution

articles.title: 'It was quite a hard thing to be there' - Jordan Cox reflects on missing out on England Test debut
articles.description: Jordan Cox was part of Royal Challengers Bengaluru in IPL 2026.

articles.title: BBL faces turmoil after Melbourne Stars-Renegades merger plan
articles.description: According to reports, the three states have requested a meeting with CA on Thursday, June 2, to address concerns arising from Cricket Victoria’s controversial plan.

articles.title: Sri Lanka Cricket offers 2026-27 national contracts, include Nuwan Thushara after NOC controversy
articles.description: The contracts run from April 1, 2026, to March 31, 2027.

articles.description: Archer had an outstanding season in the IPL, where he took 25 wickets from 16 matches to finish third in the Purple Cap leaderboard

articles.title: 'It's always a special Test' - Kane Williamson excited ahead of possible last Test match appearance at Lord's
articles.description: With New Zealand yet to have a Future Tours Programme (FTP) schedule ahead of 2027, there is the possibility that this is the legendary batter's final Test match at the iconic venue.

articles.title: 'Something has got to give' - Pat Cummins on IPL 2027 availability amid Australia's gruelling Test year
articles.description: Australia have a hectic schedule ahead of them, with up to 21 Tests in the next 12 months starting in August, including 13 Tests away in South Africa, India and England.
